exampleSentences.sentence: The market is crowded on Sundays.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: रविवार को बाजार में भीड़ होती है।

exampleSentences.sentence: We go to the temple to pray.
exampleSentences.gujaratiTranslation: અમે પ્રાર્થના કરવા મંદિરમાં જઈએ છીએ.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: हम प्रार्थना करने के लिए मंदिर जाते हैं।

exampleSentences.sentence: He was taken to the hospital after the accident.
exampleSentences.gujaratiTranslation: અકસ્માત બાદ તેને દવાખાને લઈ જવામાં આવ્યો.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: दुर्घटना के बाद उसे अस्पताल ले जाया गया।

exampleSentences.sentence: The train will arrive at the station soon.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: ट्रेन जल्द ही स्टेशन पर पहुंचेगी।

exampleSentences.sentence: My father works in an office.
exampleSentences.gujaratiTranslation: મારા પિતા એક કાર્યાલયમાં કામ કરે છે.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: मेरे पिता एक कार्यालय में काम करते हैं।
